---
title: "Markets"
---

# 📊 Market Intelligence

<div class="glass-card">

Daho Wealth tracks public equity markets across Africa and global exchanges, with a focus on making frontier and emerging market data easier to access, compare, and analyze.

</div>

<div class="feature-grid">

<div class="metric-card">

## 🇺🇸 U.S. Stocks

Coverage of selected U.S. companies across technology, AI, energy, healthcare, consumer, and high-growth sectors.

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 🌍 BRVM / UEMOA

Regional equity coverage for Francophone West Africa, including listed companies across the BRVM market.

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 🇳🇬 Nigerian Exchange

Tracking Nigerian listed equities with price, volume, value traded, and historical market activity.

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 🌐 Future Expansion

Upcoming coverage includes additional African exchanges, commodities, macroeconomic indicators, and sector-level datasets.

</div>

</div>

---

<div class="glass-card">

## Market Data Coverage

Daho Wealth organizes market data around:

- 📈 Daily price movements
- 📊 Trading volume
- 💵 Value traded
- 💱 Local currency and USD comparison
- 🏢 Company-level market profiles
- 📉 Historical price and volume trends
- 🌍 Cross-market comparison across regions

</div>

<div class="glass-card">

## Integrated Market Infrastructure

The Daho Wealth market platform combines:

- ⚡ Automated market data ingestion
- 🗄️ SQL-backed historical storage
- 📊 Time-series analytics
- 💵 Currency normalization
- 🌐 Multi-exchange integration
- 🏢 Company-level market intelligence

This infrastructure supports future dashboards, stock research, valuation tools, and investor education products.

</div>

<div class="site-footer">
  <p>
    © 2026 Daho Wealth • Financial & Economic Intelligence Platform
  </p>

  <p>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jpsossavi/" target="_blank">
      LinkedIn
    </a>

    •

    <a href="https://www.facebook.com/p/Daho-Wealth-61575871481173/" target="_blank">
      Facebook
    </a>
  </p>
</div>
